scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

#### **Road Surface & Markings**  
- **Center**: A smooth, dark gray asphalt road extends into the distance. The road has solid white edge lines (left and right) separating it from adjacent areas. The road surface appears well-maintained with minor cracks. The driving side is **right-hand traffic** (indicated by the curb and parked vehicle on the right side of the road).  

#### **Left Side (Foreground to Midground)**  
- **Left edge (foreground)**: Dense, tall **deciduous trees** with lush green foliage (trunks visible; some with rough bark, others with smooth bark).  
- **Between trees and road (midground)**: A dirt/gravel area with patches of green grass, bordered by a **concrete curb** separating it from the road.  

#### **Right Side (Foreground to Midground)**  
- **Right edge (foreground)**: A low, dense, well-trimmed **green hedge** runs parallel to the road.  
- **Behind the hedge (midground)**: A single-story building with a **beige stucco facade**.  
  - *Roof*: Sloped, brown tile roof with two small rectangular skylights and a chimney. A satellite dish is mounted on the chimney.  
  - *Windows*: Multiple windows with dark brown shutters (some shutters open, others closed). One window has a white frame and a long, narrow planter box below it. A small tree with dark red foliage grows near the building.  
- **Next to the building (midground)**: A concrete sidewalk runs parallel to the road, adjacent to the hedge.  

#### **Midground (Road and Distant Elements)**  
- **Center (midground)**: The road curves slightly right. A **silver sedan** is parked on the right side of the road (facing the camera; license plate not visible).  
- **Right side (midground)**: A **red circular sign** (no text visible, typical of a stop sign) mounted on a pole near the intersection.  
- **Left side (midground)**: Additional green trees and open grassy areas beyond the initial row of trees.  

#### **Background**  
- **Center (background)**: A larger building with a brown roof and beige facade is partially visible beyond the intersection, surrounded by trees.  
- **Center background**: A tall **metal utility pole** (with multiple wires and an antenna) stands behind the trees.  
- **Left background**: More green trees and open grassy areas.  
- **Right background**: Additional tall, narrow-trunked trees and a building with a brown roof (partially visible).  

#### **Text & Signs**  
- **Red circular sign (midground, right side)**: Shape is a circle with a red background (no text visible). No other signs with readable text or pictograms are present.  

#### **Infrastructure**  
- **Street lamps**: A tall metal street lamp pole (with a lamp head) is visible in the midground, near the red sign.  
- **Curb**: Concrete curbs line both sides of the road.  
- **Utility pole**: The tall metal pole in the center background has multiple wires and an antenna.  

#### **Vehicles & Plates**  
- **Silver sedan (midground, right side)**: A small sedan is parked on the right side of the road (facing away; license plate not visible).  

#### **Vegetation & Terrain**  
- **Trees**: All visible trees are **deciduous** with dense green foliage (varied leaf sizes). A small tree with dark red leaves grows near the building on the right.  
- **Hedge**: A low, dense green hedge on the right side (well-maintained).  
- **Terrain**: The area is **flat** (no elevation changes visible).  

#### **Buildings & Architecture**  
- The main building on the right has a **sloped tile roof**, beige stucco facade, and dark brown shutters. No architectural details (e.g., balconies, fences) are visible beyond the building’s facade and surrounding hedge.  

#### **No Absent Elements (per rules)**  
- No fire hydrants, bollards, traffic lights, or other non-visible elements are described.

details.name: red circular sign
details.reason: Red circular signs are often used for prohibition in many parts of the world, especially Europe.

details.name: white edge lines
details.reason: The presence of white edge lines and right-hand traffic helps narrow down the region.

details.name: brown tile roof
details.reason: Sloped tile roofs and stucco facades are common in Mediterranean or European architectures.
details.focused_description: The brown tile roof features uniformly shaped, interlocking tiles arranged in a sloped pattern. The tiles are a muted brown color, forming a textured surface with no visible damage or wear. The material appears to be ceramic or clay tile. The roof slopes downward from the peak, with individual tiles overlapping to create a consistent, layered appearance.

details.name: metal utility pole
details.reason: The specific configuration of wires and antennas on utility poles can be a regional clue.
details.focused_description: A tall cylindrical metal utility pole is visible. It has a gray color, smooth surface, and vertical orientation. The pole is made of metal and appears to be in good condition with no visible text or markings.

details.name: street lamp
details.reason: The design of street lamps can assist in distinguishing between different countries.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical metal street lamp with a gray pole. The pole supports a curved arm extending upward to a rounded, dome-shaped light fixture, also gray. The lamp stands upright with no visible markings or damage.
